ensures.text: FrogPosition(a, b, k) == (k / 2) as real * a as real - (k / 2) as real * b as real + if k % 2 == 1 then a as real else 0.0
FrogPosition(a, b, k) == (k / 2) as real * a as real - (k / 2) as real * b as real + if k % 2 == 1 then a as real else 0.0

invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger queries[j]} {:trigger results[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: results[j] == FrogPosition(queries[j].0, queries[j].1, queries[j].2)
forall j: int {:trigger queries[j]} {:trigger results[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: results[j] == FrogPosition(queries[j].0, queries[j].1, queries[j].2)

ensures.text: forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} {:trigger results[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: results[i] == FrogPosition(queries[i].0, queries[i].1, queries[i].2)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: queries[i].2 >= 0
